title: plantago coronopus var. latifolia
intro: Plantago coronopus var. latifolia, also known as broad-leaved buck's-horn plantain, is a variety of the plantain plant, a type of flowering herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Asia. The plant contains mucilages, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Plantago coronopus var. latifolia include soothing digestive issues, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
